title: add and then drop the same constraint...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE temp_table RENAME TO test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age < 150));
key_bug_features: adding and dropping the same constraint repeatedly
